Grand Sable Dunes along Pictured Rock National Lakeshore reaches 300 feet above Lake Superior and covers five square miles. In the past Michigan loggers rolled logs down a wooden chute located here to Lake Superior below.

Grassy sand dunes and Lake Michigan waves with a distant Chicago skyline. Indiana Dunes National Park, Indiana, 11 Aug 2012. #NationalParks

Sleeping Bear Dunes is one of Michigan's most popular gems. This place is massive! The main dune climb, which is behind me, is a 284-foot-high wall of glistening white sand that tourists climb for fun. For the adventurous, you can trek onward to Lake Michigan, which is 3.5 miles of sand round trip.

A quick 1-mile #hike, 270 stairs, #LakeMichigan, Chicago in the distance, and a baby sea turtle 🐢 A perfect little stop in #IndianaDunesNationalpark to stretch your legs 🥾 See what we discovered on the #DuneSuccessionTrail! #NationalParks #Indiana #travel #TravelBloggersCommunity #Travel

The Indiana Dunes National Lakeshore runs for nearly 25 miles along the southern shore of Lake Michigan, Indiana. Large sand dunes, which have taken thousands of years to form, rise nearly 200 feet above the lake. #indiana #lakemichigan #photography

Stormy gray skies hang over Indiana Dunes at the Indiana Dunes National Lakeshore. The national lakeshore runs for nearly 25 miles along the southern shore of Lake Michigan, in Beverly Shores, Indiana. #lakemichigan #travel #explore

Sat on a bench, listened to the Sacred Sands audio tour, & watched this painter as I learned about Indiana Dunes National Park. 15k acres of trails & 15 miles of sandy beach on Lake Michigan. #NatParkGeek #saveourparks #findjoy #roadtrip #findyourpark #NationalParkWeek #IndianaDunesNP

I'm not sure what the explanation is for this conical sand dune in the middle of the woods. It's always fun to come up on something while hiking that makes you say "huh, wonder why that is that way?" Near Lake Superior on #NorthCountryTrail #MarchIntoLandscapes | Dune
